Text[0]: Fancy seein' you again, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>! Between you and me, I'm glad to be out of that moon suit. Felt like a splittin' grape wearin' that thing...
Text[1]: Anyroad, I had a look at the new vessel. Her components may be a sight smaller than the <Emphasis>Ragnarok</Emphasis>'s, but she's got everythin' she needs to traverse the stars.
Text[2]: Now that I've finished helpin' the Loporrits redesign her propulsion systems, you should join me for a pint sometime─I want to hear all about her travels!

Text[0]: This initiative's only just gotten off the ground. If we want it to succeed, it'll need a lot of help from willing and able hands.
I expect we'll require more gadgetry to suit the needs of whatever planets we descend upon. When the time comes, I should be happy to offer my services as an engineer.
Text[1]: 'Tis scarcely different from my life in Garlemald─utilizing my skills for the sake of sustained survival─but to do so here feels altogether different. More...fulfilling, perhaps.

Text[0]: This project needs all the help it can get. Lend me your artisanal skills, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, and I'll tell you what we're planning!
As overseer of the initiative, it's my job to keep abreast of everyone's contributions. My fellow Loporrits report in regularly!
Such a marvelous moon base─I can scarcely believe the magnitude of it! Yet I know that far more awaits us beyond the furthest reaches of the stars...
Don't fret on my account, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>─go and enjoy the tour! I'd only get in the way of you creative types.
Hello again, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Whenever you next have a free moment, would you be so kind as to let me know?
Me? I serve as stellar mission control. People send in requests from all around the hub, and in turn, I post them to the contributors.
Text[1]: I'm still getting used to working with you Etheirys dwellers─involves a lot of craning my neck─but I'm more than happy to help you help us. Just say the word.

Text[0]: Owing to the many successful missions undertaken by you and yours, we've achieved all of our goals here in Sinus Ardorum.
Text[1]: These accomplishments will pay dividends on other stars, so I hope you'll continue to offer aid on all fronts. That Lalafellin project manager would surely appreciate it.

Text[0]: We're still calculating the exact coordinates for the <Emphasis>Galactic Way</Emphasis>'s voyage, but once the preparations are in place, I invite you to embark with us...into the great unknown!
You've been a great help, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. Do you have time for a chat?
My apologies, but we're still stocking the shelves at the moment. Give us just a bit more time!
Now that construction is complete, surely they could spare a moment to come and see me... <sigh> How long must I hold onto these blasted things?
